title: Prism Legend
description: Legend configuration for a mark-property channel.

legend.description: Legend options; null to suppress the legend entirely.

orient.description: Anchor side or none to hide.

format.description: Format string for legend tick labels.

tick_count.description: Suggested tick count for gradient legends.

symbol_type.description: Symbol shape used by symbol legends.

padding.description: Padding around the legend in pixels.

offset.description: Pixel offset from the chart edge.

label_limit.description: Maximum label pixel width before truncation.
